question: What is the prominent feature of the image? Select from the following options: (A) The tall skyscrapers in the city skyline. (B) The boats and ships in the dock. (C) The clock tower. (D) The large body of water in front of the city.
gold_answer: The tall skyscrapers in the city skyline
answer_choices: The tall skyscrapers in the city skyline
The boats and ships in the dock
The large body of water in front of the city
